introSection: Sharky & The Pirates is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently owned by UK fairground operator Mellors Group.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was new in July 2015.

fullText:
Sharky & The Pirates is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently owned by UK fairground operator Mellors Group.

The ride was new in July 2015.
